2605.28422.title: VITAL: Visual-Semantic Dual Supervision for Enhanced and Interpretable Latent Reasoning in Medical MLLMs
2605.28422.paper_summary: Latent reasoning enables reasoning over continuous hidden states rather than explicit tokens, avoiding the language bottleneck and inference overhead of chain-of-thought for medical VQA. However, existing methods suffer from modality collapse, insufficient visual supervision, and train-inference mismatch. Moreover, their opaque latent states offer no interpretability, which is critical in clinical applications. We propose VITAL, a latent-space reasoning framework for medical MLLMs with visual-semantic dual supervision: an auxiliary text decoder reconstructs reasoning chains from latent states, while a visual projector regresses ROI features from a frozen, independent medical vision encoder. Both modules are discarded at inference with zero overhead, yet can be re-attached post-hoc for dual interpretability, providing textual and visual explanations of the reasoning process without sacrificing efficiency. We construct a 61K dataset spanning 9 imaging modalities, exceeding prior medical visual latent reasoning datasets by an order of magnitude. Experiments on 7 benchmarks show that VITAL consistently and substantially outperforms the backbone, all latent reasoning baselines, and medical MLLMs trained on far larger data, achieving state-of-the-art results competitive with trillion-parameter proprietary models.
2605.28422.paper_summary_zh: 潛在推理使得對連續隱藏狀態進行推理，而不是明確的標記，從而避免了醫療 VQA 的語言瓶頸和推理開銷。 然而，現有方法面臨著模態崩潰、視覺監督不足和訓練-推理不匹配的問題。此外，它們不透明的潛在狀態缺乏可解釋性，這在臨床應用中至關重要。 我們提出了 VITAL，一個針對醫療 MLLMs 的潛在空間推理框架，具有視覺-語義雙重監督：一個輔助文本解碼器從潛在狀態重建推理鏈，而一個視覺投影器從一個凍結的獨立醫療視覺編碼器回歸 ROI 特徵。 這兩個模塊在推理時被丟棄，沒有任何開銷，但可以在事後重新附加以實現雙重可解釋性，提供推理過程的文本和視覺解釋，而不犧牲效率。 我們構建了一個涵蓋 9 種影像模態的 61K 數據集，超過了之前醫療視覺潛在推理數據集一個數量級。 在 7 個基準上的實驗顯示，VITAL 一直顯著超越基礎模型、所有潛在推理基準，以及在更大數據上訓練的醫療 MLLMs，達到與萬億參數專有模型相競爭的最先進結果。
2605.28422.author: Qiaoru Li et.al.
2605.28422.authors: Qiaoru Li, Shaotian Liang, Jintao Chen, Haoran Sun, Yuxiang Cai, Jianwei Yin, Yankai Jiang
